title: The Forgotten Keys
content: When Clara arrived home after work, she searched her bag for her keys but could not find them. She checked every pocket again and again. Suddenly, she remembered leaving them on the kitchen table that morning. Unfortunately, her roommate was still at work. Clara sat near the apartment entrance and waited patiently. A neighbor passing by started a friendly conversation with her. About an hour later, her roommate finally arrived and opened the door. After that day, Clara decided to always check for her keys before leaving home.
